✨ Features

Everything You Need

Powerful features to help you track and optimize your AI usage

📊

Real-time Analytics

Watch your AI usage in real-time with beautiful charts and detailed breakdowns by provider, model, and time period.

💰

Cost Optimization

Identify spending patterns and get insights on how to reduce your AI costs without sacrificing quality.

🔄

Multi-Provider

Track usage across Cursor, BLT, ZenMux, MiniMax, and more—all in one beautiful dashboard.

📱

Menu Bar Widget

Quick access from your menu bar. Check today's usage at a glance without opening the main window.

🔔

Smart Alerts

Set up custom alerts when usage exceeds thresholds. Never be surprised by unexpected bills.

🔒

Private & Secure

Your data stays on your device. No cloud servers, no tracking—just you and your usage data.

🚀 How It Works

Start in Minutes

Get up and running in three simple steps

1

Download & Install

Download AiCash from GitHub or install via our simple script. It works on macOS 13+.

2

Add Your Providers

Connect your AI providers with API keys or cookies. We support Cursor, BLT, ZenMux, and more.

3

Track & Optimize

Watch your usage in real-time. Get insights and alerts to optimize your AI spending.
